title: pelargonium bijugum
intro: Pelargonium bijugum, also known as Red Storkbill or Split-leaved Geranium, is a species of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial and anti-inflammatory activities. The health benefits of Pelargonium bijugum are said to include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its use as a treatment for digestive problems. The herbal preparations of this plant can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
